seoTitle: Kordabup vs Korrelocking — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kordabup and Korrelocking. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kordabup and Korrelocking.
heading: Kordabup vs Korrelocking — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kordabup, Western Australia and Korrelocking, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Korrelocking has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kordabup (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kordabup or Korrelocking safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kordabup has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Korrelocking scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kordabup scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Korrelocking scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kordabup or Korrelocking?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Korrelocking has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
